exportFormats.name: Import paper to wiki
exportFormats.outputPathTemplate: wiki/sources/{{title | lower | replace(':', '') | replace('?', '') | replace(',', '') | replace('.', '') | replace('(', '') | replace(')', '') | replace('/', ' ') | replace('&', ' and ') | replace("'", '') | replace('’', '') | replace('  ', ' ') | trim | replace(' ', '-') | replace('--', '-') | replace('--', '-') }}.md

citeSuggestTemplate: [[wiki/sources/{{title | lower | replace(':', '') | replace('?', '') | replace(',', '') | replace('.', '') | replace('(', '') | replace(')', '') | replace('/', ' ') | replace('&', ' and ') | replace("'", '') | replace('’', '') | replace('  ', ' ') | trim | replace(' ', '-') | replace('--', '-') | replace('--', '-') }}]]
